tools.name: utility_generate_uuid
tools.description:
Use this when you need to generate unique identifiers for database records, API keys, or session tokens. Returns an array of IDs in the chosen format.

1. ids -- array of generated identifiers (strings)
2. format -- the format used (uuidv4, uuidv7, ulid, nanoid)
3. count -- number of IDs generated
4

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "utility_generate_uuid" references sensitive artifacts (password, session token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
